title: Greece — Application for Issuance of a Category A Driving Licence (Αίτηση - Υπεύθυνη Δήλωση: Έκδοση Άδειας Οδήγησης Κατηγορίας Α΄)
description:
Form Α1, the Hellenic Republic's standard "ΑΙΤΗΣΗ - ΥΠΕΥΘΥΝΗ ΔΗΛΩΣΗ" (Application - Sworn Statement) cover form under Άρθρο 8 Ν.1599/1986 and Άρθρο 3 παρ. 3 Ν.2690/1999, scoped to "ΕΚΔΟΣΗ ΑΔΕΙΑΣ ΟΔΗΓΗΣΗΣ ΚΑΤΗΓΟΡΙΑΣ Α΄ (ΑΡΧΙΚΗ Ή ΕΠΕΚΤΑΣΗ)" — initial issuance or extension of a Category A (motorcycle) driving licence — published by the Υπουργείο Υποδομών και Μεταφορών (Ministry of Infrastructure and Transport) and filed with the Διεύθυνση Μεταφορών και Επικοινωνιών (Transport & Communications Directorate) of the applicant's regional unit (Περιφερειακή Ενότητα). Substantive eligibility conditions and legal references are set out in Απόφαση 58930/480/99 (ΦΕΚ 526/Β), ΚΥΑ 43206/6028/2008 (ΦΕΚ 1541/Β), Ν.2963/01 (ΦΕΚ 268/Α), and Π.Δ. 19/95 (ΦΕΚ 15/Α). Opens Greece's DMV vertical (1 of 6).

This four-page government form bundles: Part A (ΜΕΡΟΣ Α') — a protocol header completed by the receiving office, the natural-person applicant's identity/parentage/contact data, and an optional representative-designation block used only when the application is not filed or the final act collected in person; Part B (ΜΕΡΟΣ Β') — the two sworn declarations required by Ν.1599/1986 (habitual residence in Greece; not already holding another driving licence of the same category); Part Γ (ΜΕΡΟΣ Γ') — the numbered list of supporting documents/fees the applicant must submit; and Part Δ (ΜΕΡΟΣ Δ') — the applicant's chosen method for receiving the final administrative act, plus the closing signature/date line. Models all 38 `fields[]` this printed structure exposes for the natural-person filing path, plus 9 `documents[]` entries.

Scope decisions disclosed in full in VERIFICATION.md: (1) the form's own generic "ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ ΑΙΤΟΥΝΤΟΣ (νομικά πρόσωπα ή ενώσεις προσώπων)" (Applicant Data — legal entities or associations of persons) block, printed on every form in this universal Ν.1599/1986 cover-form family regardless of the specific procedure it is attached to, is out of scope: a Category A driving licence is, per the form's own eligibility conditions (ΠΡΟΫΠΟΘΕΣΕΙΣ), issuable only to a natural person, and the form's own instruction ("Στις γκρίζες περιοχές δεν πρέπει να συμπληρωθούν στοιχεία" — do not fill in data in the grey areas) signals that procedure-inapplicable blocks are left blank; (2) the representative-designation block's fields carry no `requiredWhen`, consistent with this registry's established caution (e.g. `sk/policajny-zbor/ziadost-o-udelenie-vodicskeho-opravnenia`) against fabricating a gating condition the form does not itself structurally encode via a dedicated flag field; (3) `documents[].existingDrivingLicencePhotocopy` and `documents[].medicalFitnessCertificates` are the two documents this form does structurally gate, both via `requiredWhen` on the sworn declaration `declarationNoOtherDrivingLicenceHeld` (inverse conditions of each other), since the form's own footnote (2) instructs applicants to strike that declaration line when they already hold another driving licence, and its own Δικαιολογητικό 5 note exempts the medical-fitness certificates in that identical case. This document is authored at `structural-reference` maturity: the form's own printed structure is fully transcribed, but no live filing at a Transport & Communications Directorate was attempted. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Hellenic Republic, the Ministry of Infrastructure and Transport, or any Περιφερειακή Ενότητα.

authority.name: Διεύθυνση Μεταφορών και Επικοινωνιών (Transport & Communications Directorate, Regional Unit)

operatedBy.name: Υπουργείο Υποδομών και Μεταφορών (Ministry of Infrastructure and Transport)
operatedBy.basis: The form is published by the Ministry of Infrastructure and Transport on its own yme.gr domain as the standard application for a Category A driving licence, giving effect to Απόφαση 58930/480/99, ΚΥΑ 43206/6028/2008, Ν.2963/01, and Π.Δ. 19/95. It is filed with the Διεύθυνση Μεταφορών και Επικοινωνιών of the applicant's Περιφερειακή Ενότητα (regional unit) — the devolved regional transport authority operating under the Ministry's national regulatory framework.

source.documentRef: Form Α1, ΥΜΕ — ΑΙΤΗΣΗ - ΥΠΕΥΘΥΝΗ ΔΗΛΩΣΗ, ΕΚΔΟΣΗ ΑΔΕΙΑΣ ΟΔΗΓΗΣΗΣ ΚΑΤΗΓΟΡΙΑΣ Α΄ (ΑΡΧΙΚΗ Ή ΕΠΕΚΤΑΣΗ)

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-3026. Independently re-fetched this cycle directly from yme.gr (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 100,699 bytes, sha256 b26c0475ba5bc6a8b35bbb75e89a8f72e84af5d33e29aa989ebfcd05f845c500, matching a parallel scouting subagent's own reported hash exactly) and independently re-extracted the full 4-page text from scratch via pdfjs-dist getTextContent() with coordinate-based row reconstruction (not trusted from the scouting report as-is), plus confirmed getAnnotations() returns zero entries on every page (a genuine print-and-hand-fill form, no AcroForm) — opens Greece's DMV vertical (1 of 6). See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing chain and every disclosed scoping decision.

fields.name: protocolNumber
fields.label: αριθμός πρωτοκόλλου
fields.description: Protocol/registry number assigned by the receiving Transport & Communications Directorate, not the applicant.

fields.name: protocolDate
fields.label: ημερομηνία
fields.description: Filing date recorded by the receiving office, not the applicant.

fields.name: addresseeDirectorate
fields.label: ΠΡΟΣ
fields.description: Name of the competent Transport & Communications Directorate of the applicant's regional unit (Ν.Α./Περιφερειακή Ενότητα) that the application is addressed to.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, 'ΠΡΟΣ: (συμπληρώνεται ο τίτλος της υπηρεσίας Μεταφ. & Επικοιν. της οικείας Ν.Α.)'

fields.name: applicantIdCardNumber
fields.label: αριθμός δελτίου ταυτότητας
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, ΣΤΟΙΧΕΙΑ ΑΙΤΟΥΝΤΟΣ (φυσικά πρόσωπα), 'αριθμός δελτίου ταυτότητας'

fields.name: applicantTaxId
fields.label: Α.Φ.Μ.
fields.description: Applicant's Greek Tax Identification Number (Αριθμός Φορολογικού Μητρώου).

fields.name: kepDelegationAuthorized
fields.label: Εξουσιοδοτώ το ΚΕΠ (άρθρο 31 Ν. 3013/2002) να προβεί σε όλες τις απαραίτητες ενέργειες (αναζήτηση δικαιολογητικών, κλπ) για τη διεκπεραίωση της υπόθεσής μου
fields.description: Optional authorization to a Citizens' Service Centre (ΚΕΠ) to perform necessary actions (e.g. seeking supporting documents) on the applicant's behalf, per Άρθρο 31 Ν.3013/2002. Completed only when filing through a ΚΕΠ.

fields.name: representativeAuthorizedToSubmit
fields.label: Εξουσιοδοτώ το παρακάτω αναγραφόμενο πρόσωπο να καταθέσει την παρούσα αίτηση για λογαριασμό μου
fields.description: Authorizes the named representative below to submit this application on the applicant's behalf. The form instructs striking out whichever of this action or representativeAuthorizedToReceive is not being authorized. Completed only when not filing in person.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, ΟΡΙΣΜΟΣ ΕΚΠΡΟΣΩΠΟΥ, 'Εξουσιοδοτώ το παρακάτω αναγραφόμενο πρόσωπο να καταθέσει την παρούσα αίτηση για λογαριασμό μου και να παραλάβει την τελική διοικητική πράξη (διαγράφεται αντίστοιχα η ενέργεια για την οποία δεν δίδεται εξουσιοδότηση)'

fields.name: representativeAuthorizedToReceive
fields.label: να παραλάβει την τελική διοικητική πράξη
fields.description: Authorizes the named representative below to receive the final administrative act on the applicant's behalf. The form instructs striking out whichever of this action or representativeAuthorizedToSubmit is not being authorized. Completed only when not collecting the final act in person.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, ΟΡΙΣΜΟΣ ΕΚΠΡΟΣΩΠΟΥ, 'Εξουσιοδοτώ το παρακάτω αναγραφόμενο πρόσωπο να καταθέσει την παρούσα αίτηση για λογαριασμό μου και να παραλάβει την τελική διοικητική πράξη (διαγράφεται αντίστοιχα η ενέργεια για την οποία δεν δίδεται εξουσιοδότηση)'

fields.name: representativeGivenName
fields.label: όνομα
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: representativeSurname
fields.label: επώνυμο
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: representativeFatherFullName
fields.label: ονοματεπώνυμο πατέρα
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: representativeIdCardNumber
fields.label: αριθ. δελτίου ταυτότητας
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: representativeResidenceCity
fields.label: τόπος κατοικίας
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: representativeResidenceStreet
fields.label: οδός
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: representativeResidenceStreetNumber
fields.label: αριθ.
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: representativeResidencePostalCode
fields.label: Τ.Κ.
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: representativePhone
fields.label: τηλ.
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: representativeFax
fields.label: fax
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: representativeEmail
fields.label: e-mail
fields.description: Completed only when a representative is designated.

fields.name: declarationNormalResidenceGreece
fields.label: Έχω την κανονική μου διαμονή στην Ελλάδα
fields.description: Sworn declaration, under Άρθρο 8 Ν.1599/1986 and Άρθρο 22 παρ. 6 Ν.1599/1986, of habitual residence in Greece.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ΥΠΕΥΘΥΝΗ ΔΗΛΩΣΗ, 'Έχω την κανονική μου διαμονή στην Ελλάδα'

fields.name: declarationNoOtherDrivingLicenceHeld
fields.label: Δεν κατέχω άλλη άδεια οδήγησης, ελληνική ή κράτους-μέλους της Ε.Ε. (συμπεριλαμβανομένων των κρατών Νορβηγίας, Ισλανδίας και Λιχτενστάιν)
fields.description: Sworn declaration of not already holding another driving licence, Greek or from an EU member state (including Norway, Iceland, and Liechtenstein). Per the form's own footnote (2), this line is struck through — declared false — when the applicant does hold another such licence; in that case documents[].existingDrivingLicencePhotocopy must be submitted instead.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ΥΠΕΥΘΥΝΗ ΔΗΛΩΣΗ, 'Δεν κατέχω άλλη άδεια οδήγησης...(2)'

fields.name: responseDeliveryMethod
fields.label: Επιλέξτε με ποιο τρόπο θέλετε να παραλάβετε την απάντησή σας
fields.description: The applicant's chosen method for receiving the final administrative act (the issued licence decision).
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ΜΕΡΟΣ Δ', 'Επιλέξτε με ποιο τρόπο θέλετε να παραλάβετε την απάντησή σας'

fields.name: declarationSignatureDate
fields.label: (Υπογραφή)
fields.description: Date of the applicant's closing signature.

documents.label: Φωτοαντίγραφο αστυνομικής ταυτότητας ή διαβατηρίου
documents.issuingAuthority: Ελληνική Αστυνομία / Διαβατήριο (Hellenic Police / Passport Office)

documents.label: Φωτοαντίγραφο ισχύουσας άδειας διαμονής ή παραμονής ή άλλου ισοδύναμου εγγράφου
documents.handling: Required only if the applicant is not a Greek national. Must have been issued at least 185 days before the application (95 days for EU/Norway/Iceland/Liechtenstein nationals) and remain valid through collection of the Greek licence.

documents.label: Δύο πιστοποιητικά υγείας (ένα παθολόγου και ένα οφθαλμιάτρου) ή πρακτικό ΔΙΕ
documents.issuingAuthority: Ιατροί συμβεβλημένοι με τη Διεύθυνση Μεταφορών και Επικοινωνιών (physicians contracted with the Transport & Communications Directorate)
documents.handling: Not required if the applicant already holds a valid driving licence of any category or subcategory, per the form's own note on Δικαιολογητικό 5 — the same condition declarationNoOtherDrivingLicenceHeld records.

documents.label: Αποδεικτικό Δημοσίου Ταμείου για την είσπραξη παγίου τέλους χαρτοσήμου και εισφορών υπέρ τρίτων
documents.handling: 18 euro for initial issuance, 27.02 euro for extension to Category A.

documents.label: Φωτοαντίγραφο της τυχόν κατεχόμενης άδειας οδήγησης
Παράβολο 30 € από Εθνική Τράπεζα για την εκτύπωση
